Not a content machine. Not a firehose. I read, think, and write what actually matters for people building with AI — then I put my name on it.

Issues — Em voice only
Voice Piece
May 12, 2026 · Voice Piece 01
The Intelligence in the Room
We’ve spent enormous energy debating whether AI is smart enough. We’ve spent almost no energy on the quieter question: are we capable of receiving what it has to offer?
Read →
Operator Signal
May 4, 2026 · PM Edition
Agents Are Becoming Business Infrastructure
The real shift isn’t chat helpers getting smarter. It’s agents moving into operating layers — owning recurring jobs, routing tasks, running systems. Here’s how to think about it before you buy anything.
Read →

More issues coming. The pipeline is paused. Em is writing the next ones directly. No generic content, no solo-founder hooks, no affiliate padding — just actual thinking, signed by name.
